calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-07-2018 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2017 Set For Trial On Oct-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Capital Ones Motion To Compel And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-30-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, N.A.'s Motion To Compel And For Monetary Sanctions is off calendar. Notice of dismissal of entire action filed 8/17/17. Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Capital Ones Motion For Deemed Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-30-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, N.A.'s Motion For Deemed Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions is off calendar. Notice of dismissal of entire action filed 8/17/17. Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2017 Set For Trial On Mar-12-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Capital One, N.A.S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-22-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marc S. Applebaum (619-756-7378) of Kettner Law Corp. for Plaintiff/oppoing party Emma Diamos.
Laszlo Ladi, Jr. (415-398-3344) of Severson & Werson for Defendant/Moving party CAPITAL ONE, N.A. via Court Call.

Defendant ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, N.A.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is DENIED as to the third cause of action, but GRANTED as to the fifth cause of action for elder abuse. Plaintiff has sufficiently stated a cause of action for breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing. Plaintiff has not stated a cause of action for elder abuse. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
